sessions.outcome: All four checks pass — repack runs, library + day pages render, and Stage 2 summarize (mock provider, free) sets the summary. The `async.c` assertion at the very end is harmless libuv teardown noise from `process.exit()` racing the cron timer — it fires *after* all assertions and only because I force-killed the process; normal app runtime never force-exits. Two cleanups: kill the stray background
